keyEvents.text: Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Goal! Saudi Arabia 1, Uruguay 0. Abdulelah Al Amri (Saudi Arabia) right footed shot from very close range to the centre of the goal following a corner.
Abdulelah Al Amri (Saudi Arabia) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Uruguay. Juan Manuel Sanabria replaces Matías Viña.
Substitution, Uruguay. Agustín Canobbio replaces Darwin Núñez.
Second Half begins Saudi Arabia 1, Uruguay 0.
Delay in match because of an injury Mohammed Al Owais (Saudi Arabia).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Substitution, Saudi Arabia. Nasser Al Dawsari replaces Musab Al Juwayr.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Substitution, Uruguay. Nicolás de la Cruz replaces Manuel Ugarte.
Goal! Saudi Arabia 1, Uruguay 1. Maxi Araújo (Uruguay) left footed shot from the left side of the six yard box to the bottom left corner.
Substitution, Uruguay. Brian Rodríguez replaces Maxi Araújo.
Substitution, Saudi Arabia. Nawaf Bu Washl replaces Mohammed Abu Al Shamat.
Substitution, Uruguay. Rodrigo Aguirre replaces Federico Viñas.
Substitution, Saudi Arabia. Abdullah Al Hamddan replaces Moteb Al Harbi.
Substitution, Saudi Arabia. Alaa Al Hejji replaces Feras Al Brikan.
Substitution, Saudi Arabia. Ali Lajami replaces Saud Abdulhamid.
